title: Essence
description: A mod about essences which can be used to make mob drops and more!
body:
Mobs now drop differnet types of mob essence which can be used to make differnet mob drops such as gunpowder and rotten flesh

 

Ores drop basic essence which can be used to make coal and copper (more recipes coming soon)

This applies to all ores including modded ones(if they have the forge:ores tag)

Can be changed in the config to make it drop more or less commonly 

 

Use JEI to view all recipes



Join The discord for help and any suggestions of recipes and or mods to be supported

Various mods supported such as tinkers, the undergarden, all the ores, slient gear/gems and many more

If you want a mod added send a message on the discord 

 

 https://discord.gg/f92STFGN32
